objections.description: The critical-path theme script is truncated mid-execution. The artifact cuts off at 'matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme:light)').matches ? 'light' :' without completing the ternary, setting the data-theme attribute, or closing the IIFE. This will cause a JavaScript syntax error and break FOUC prevention entirely.
objections.suggested_fix: Complete the script: complete the ternary with 'dark', add document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', t), and close the IIFE properly. Test that theme is applied before first paint.

objections.location: Section 7: DESIGN TOKEN SYSTEM - Light Theme Accent
objections.description: Light theme --accent-default: #7c3aed on --surface-0: #ffffff claims 5.4:1 contrast ratio but actually measures ~4.5:1. This is borderline AA for normal text and fails for small UI elements like icon strokes or thin borders. Premium/confident aesthetic requires confident contrast, not borderline compliance.
objections.suggested_fix: Darken light-mode accent to #6d28d9 (violet-700) which achieves 5.9:1 on white, or use #5b21b6 (violet-800) for 7.2:1. Update --accent-hover and --accent-active accordingly to maintain visual hierarchy.

objections.location: Section 7: DESIGN TOKEN SYSTEM - Status Colors
objections.description: Status colors (emerald-400 #34d399, amber-400 #fbbf24, blue-400 #60a5fa) fail WCAG AA contrast on light mode surfaces when used as text or small badges. Amber-400 on white is only 2.1:1. These work on dark surfaces but spec requires dual-theme compliance.
objections.suggested_fix: Define separate status color tokens for light theme: --status-warning-light: #d97706 (amber-600), --status-info-light: #2563eb (blue-600), --status-success-light: #059669 (emerald-600). Apply via [data-theme='light'] override.

objections.location: Section 7: DESIGN TOKEN SYSTEM - Shadow Values
objections.description: Light mode shadows use rgba(0,0,0,0.12) for --shadow-lg which creates gray cast on white surfaces rather than clean elevation. Premium aesthetic (Nubank/Flighty) uses warmer or cooler shadow tints, not neutral gray. Also no shadow token for focused interactive elements.
objections.suggested_fix: Change light mode shadows to use colored tints: --shadow-lg: 0 8px 24px rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.15) for subtle brand warmth. Add --shadow-focus: 0 0 0 2px var(--surface-0), 0 0 0 4px var(--accent-default) for focus rings.

objections.description: Focus-visible spec says '2px solid var(--accent-default) outline with 2px offset' but doesn't specify outline-offset CSS property or how this interacts with border-radius. Cards with --radius-md (10px) will have clipped focus outlines without proper offset handling.
objections.suggested_fix: Add explicit CSS: 'outline: 2px solid var(--accent-default); outline-offset: 2px;' to focus-visible styles. For rounded elements, ensure outline doesn't clip by using box-shadow fallback or increasing offset to 3px on radius > 8px elements.

objections.description: Skeleton shimmer gradient (surface-1 → surface-2 → surface-1) has insufficient contrast in light mode: #f4f4f5 to #e4e4e7 is only 1.15:1 ratio. The shimmer animation will be nearly invisible, defeating the purpose of indicating loading state.
objections.suggested_fix: Increase shimmer contrast in light mode: use #e4e4e7 to #d4d4d8 to #e4e4e7 (surface-2 → surface-3 → surface-2) for 1.3:1 ratio minimum. Or add dedicated --skeleton-base and --skeleton-shine tokens with higher contrast.

objections.location: Section 7: DESIGN TOKEN SYSTEM - Typography Scale
objections.description: Font scale lacks 22px (1.375rem) option between --font-lg (18px) and --font-xl (20px). Common pattern for section headers/subtitles. Also line-heights are fixed but should have more granular options for tight display text vs relaxed body copy.
objections.suggested_fix: Add --font-2xl: 1.375rem (22px) with --lh-tight: 1.2. Add --font-4xl: 2.25rem (36px) for hero displays on lg breakpoint. Document which scale level maps to which semantic heading (h1-h6).

suggestions.description: Add vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke to SVG icons to ensure 1.5px stroke remains consistent across all icon sizes (20px, 24px, 32px). Currently stroke may appear thicker on smaller icons.

Add visual spec for bottom sheet drag handle: 32px wide, 4px tall, --surface-3 background, --radius-full, centered at top of sheet with 16px margin. Currently mentioned as dismiss mechanism but not designed.

Add --tab-active-indicator token for bottom bar active state. Spec mentions 'accent fill' but doesn't define whether this is background, bottom border, or icon color change. Recommend 3px bottom border with --accent-default.
